themes.exampleQuote: They homemake all of their syrups which makes it worth it and so much tastier!
Come to Spot of Coffee for a toasted miso latte that will change your life.
I am not much of a coffee drinker, but I highly recommend their matcha!!!
The man who took my order and made my drink was very friendly and nice as well.
Come to Spot of Coffee for excellent conscientious neighborhood vibes at a time when finding your community matters.
My coffee tasted so burnt with a horrible aftertaste!

sentiment_summary: Reviewers rave about Spot of Coffee's inventive, housemade-ingredient lattes and matcha drinks, while one outlier flagged a badly burnt cup as a quality-control concern.
notable_quote: Their drinks are very differently delicious from the syrup-based lattes you'll find elsewhere.
